## oak service deploy

Deploy a new service instance

### Synopsis

Deploy a new instance of a service.

  oak s deploy <id|name>    deploy one instance
  oak s deploy --all        deploy one instance for every registered service

To deploy multiple instances at once, use: oak s scale up <id|name> <count>

```
oak service deploy [service-id|name] [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --all    Deploy one new instance for every registered service
  -h, --help   help for deploy
```
